login.title: Sign In
login.subtitle: Authenticate with your verified national identity to access the platform.
login.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
login.legal: By signing in, you agree to our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.

register.title: Register
register.subtitle: Create your verified digital identity
register.didGenerated: Your decentralized identifier has been generated

logout.title: Sign Out
logout.message: You have been signed out successfully.

session.expired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.

unauthorized.title: Unauthorized
unauthorized.message: You do not have permission to access this resource.

welcome.title: Welcome to TML
welcome.message: Your identity has been verified. You can now access the platform.

consent.title: Data Consent Required
consent.description: Before proceeding, please review the data that will be shared and processed.

cnieHash.label: CNIE Identity Hash
cnieHash.description: SHA-256 hash of your national ID, used to bind your digital identity.

authLevel.label: Authentication Level
authLevel.description: Your MOSIP e-Signet assurance level for role-based access control.

roleAssignment.label: Role Assignment
roleAssignment.description: Your designated role (inspector, auditor, citizen, contractor) on the platform.

privacyNotice.title: Privacy Notice
privacyNotice.body: Your personal data is processed solely for infrastructure accountability purposes and is protected under Moroccan data protection law.
privacyNotice.law: Morocco Law 09-08 on Personal Data Protection

identity.label: Identity Verification
identity.description: Required for CNIE-anchored digital identity binding

attestation.label: Attestation & Credentials
attestation.description: Allow issuance and verification of verifiable credentials for milestone attestation

analytics.label: Analytics & Improvement
analytics.description: Help improve platform reliability through anonymized usage data

consent.fullPolicyText: Your data is processed in accordance with Morocco Law 09-08 on the protection of individuals with regard to the processing of personal data. Data is stored within sovereign infrastructure and is never shared with third parties without explicit consent. You may exercise your rights of access, rectification, and deletion at any time.
